## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Owen's progress, refine processes, and optimize Kyle's calendar management.](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Owen excels at lead qualification; process refinements needed for post-call actions](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Kyle aims to optimize his calendar for better work-life balance and strategic thinking](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [New weekly pipeline review meeting established for Fridays at 9 AM (45 mins)](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [Focus on following up with qualified leads who haven't booked meetings](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Topics

### Owen's Progress and Role Clarification

  - [Owen feels strongest in lead qualification pre-meetings](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Has helped identify 3-4 initially unqualified opportunities as actually qualified](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Seeks clarity on post-call actions (follow-up emails, Slack channel creation)](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Suggests establishing a clear process to avoid task overlap with Bruno](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Follow-up Email Process

  - [Debate over including Statement of Work (SOW) in initial follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Goal: Send follow-up within 2 hours of meeting](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Different approach for non-fit meetings: share recording, keep communication open](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)

### Calendar Optimization for Kyle

  - [Wednesdays and Thursdays: Heavy intro call days](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Tuesdays: Limit to 2 intro calls (in-office day)](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Mondays and Fridays: Avoid intro calls, focus on follow-ups and heads-down time](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [Aim for two 2-hour blocks of heads-down time on Mondays and Fridays](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)

### New Pipeline Review Meeting

  - [Scheduled for Fridays at 9 AM, starting May 30th](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [45-minute duration](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Attendees: Kyle, Marcel (optional), Bruno, Bridget, Owen, Jason](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Future considerations: refining reporting and potentially involving Owen in preparation](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)

### Follow-up on Qualified Leads

  - [Focus on leads that qualified but didn't book meetings](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Example: Chief Digital Officer from a larger company](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
  - [Strategy: Flag these leads for custom follow-up approaches](https://fathom.video/share/5oQskykcnjxh6spsuaxdhkbZ47eH1SuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
